arts.ttl: Loan move back on the table for Bayern Munich prodigy Mathys Tel?
arts.sum: A loan move either in January or next summer could be an option for Mathys Tel if he doesn’t recommend himself for more minutes through performances in the coming months. Bayern Munich ’s talented teenage attacker Mathys Tel looks like he could be facing an uphill climb for minutes in Bavaria this season under head coach Vincent Kompany.
Bayern Munich bosses Vincent Kompany and Christoph Freund spoke highly of Michael Olise at a press conference on Friday.

arts.ttl: Bayern Campus bearing first-team fruit through Pavlović & Co.
arts.sum: Alexander Pavlović, Arijon Ibrahimović and Josip Stanišić are the latest to come through the Bayern Campus. Pavlović, Ibrahimović and Stanišić are just three of eight academy alumni who have been named in the club’s UEFA Champions League squad for the 2024/25 campaign.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich to make a late decision on Manuel Neuer
arts.sum: Manuel Neuer was substituted during Bayern Munich’s 9-2 Champions League win against Dinamo Zagreb on Tuesday night, and the Bundesliga side won’t be taking any risks with the player’s fitness…

arts.ttl: Celtic manager suggests Bayern Munich have earned free ticket to Champions League final
arts.sum: On the opening night of the Champions League ’s new “league phase” Bayern Munich obliterated Dinamo Zagreb, 9-2. Brendan Rodgers jokes after Celtic’s 5-1 win over Slovan Bratislava puts them second in the league phase of the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Dinamo Zagreb sack their coach after 9-2 defeat to Bayern Munich in the Champions League
arts.sum: In the case of Dinamo Zagreb coach Sergej Jakirović, that was his fate as he was given the sack by his club after a crushing 9-2 defeat to Bayern Munich on the first day of the Champions League : Dinamo Zagreb have dismissed their head coach Sergej Jakirović following the 9-2 defeat to Bayern pic.twitter.com/TkuQAiH226

arts.ttl: Toni Kroos on Jamal Musiala and Florian Wirtz: “Two players we’ve longed for in Germany for years.”
arts.sum: Over the past few weeks, Jamal Musiala and Florian Wirtz have been headline news for a number of varying reasons. While it has been heavily reported that Bayern Munich are…

arts.ttl: The stats behind Thomas Müller’s record career with Bayern Munich and Germany
arts.sum: In a career spanning over 16 years, Thomas Müller has seen and won it all with boyhood club Bayern Munich and Germany, cementing his place among world football’s greats with records that may never be broken. 16 – The number of consecutive seasons where Müller has scored in the Bundesliga, equalling the league record held by Holger Fach, Mats Hummels, Bernd Nickel, Olaf Thon and Michael Zorc, with only Nickel ( Eintracht Frankfurt ) and Zorc ( Borussia Dortmund ) having achieved this for one club.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich to offer Mykhaylo Mudryk a lifeline from Chelsea?; Bayern players frustrated with lack of communication from coach; Liverpool could be a player for Jamal Musiala; More Harry Kane vs. Erling Haaland talk; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich has been linked to Chelsea FC attacker Mykhaylo Mudryk several times in the past, but now — given the London team’s laughably big squad — there could be an opportunity for the Bavarians to grab a player on a bargain deal (depending on how much Chelsea wants to unload the Ukrainian): kicker reports that several Bayern Munich players are becoming irritated by Vincent Kompany’s lack of communication when it comes to the squad.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane stressed importance of penalties after Bayern Munich’s 9-2 thrashing of Dinamo Zagreb
arts.sum: For the most part in Bayern Munich ’s 9-2 thrashing of Dinamo Zagreb in the Champions League, it was one way traffic, but the Croatian side did have their bright spell when they scored two goals in as many minutes to start the second. Since he has joined Bayern from Tottenham last summer, he has now scored a total of 13 penalties for the Rekordmeister, and he admitted that, even as a regular penalty-taker, he was not used to taken three in one match.
